feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: sap abap email functionality using classes issue with html table
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I have to send email via program . When I created the body of the email without containing any variable but only text, there is no issue in it. But when I wants to get variable values inside table it is not taking the values.

it_email_body[] = VALUE #( ( line = '<html><body>' )
                           ( line = 'Date:'  )   "how to use sy-datum here.
                            ( line = '<br>')
                            ( line = 'Subject: Revalidate request' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'QA/ QC Team.' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'Refer to below details of material expiring/ expired. You are requested to kindly review and re-validate the same.' )

   ( line = '<br>')
   ( line = '<table style="font-family:calibri;font-size:15;MARGIN:10px;"' )
   ( line = 'cellspacing="0" cellpadding="1" width="75%" ')
   ( line =  'border="1"><tbody><tr>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Sr. No.</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material Description</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material code</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Expired / Expiring on</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Batch No.</th>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-matnr '</td>' )  "facing issue at this line for creating second  row for values to  the table from the worarea WA-matnr wa-batch .
( line = '<tr><td>' wa-  '</td></tr>' )
   ( line =   )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-charg 
*   ( line =  '</td>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-vfdat 
*   ( line = '</td>' )

  ( line = '</html></body>' )

 ( line = 'Post validation, kindly share the re-validated/ validity extension certificate for updates and records.' )

This is not working.

it_email_body TYPE bcsy_text,  as per the c ode

note : My aim here is to get html table to be added to program with  email functionality.
 ( line = 'Regards' )
 ( line = 'Stores Team.' ) ).

entry.title: HANA instance access within steampunk instance for "SAP HANA smart data access connections"
entry.content:
Team,

I was trying to explore " SAP HANA smart data access connections based on ODBC" . My question is can i create virtual table within the HANA instance of a steampunk instance. My intension is to access remote tables from steampunk. First of all , do partners and developers have access to HANA instance of steampunk.

 


Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: BRF+ in S/4 HANA Public Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Public Cloud Experts, 

We have developed multiple BRF+ applications in our current On-Premise Landscape for forms and other custom RAP applications . Now we are looking at moving some of our custom to Cloud . When we build Custom BRF+ applications using the BRF+ application in the starter tenant and when i try to call the BRF+ application using the class cl_fdt_function_process class the get the error that the class is not permitted in the cloud .

Can you anyone guide me how to access BRF+ applications from Public cloud Developer Extensionsibilty ?

 

Thanks,

Vijaya

entry.title: Mutiple Warning message for field check
entry.content:
Hello All,

Reference to subjected issue we need your expertise help, for our client at outbound delivery we already have implemented custom logic for check custom field and selected as an "I' information if field is missing before saving the delivery at both create and change mode and it's working perfectly fine.

For fulfill our client requirement we need to implement one more custom logic in same outbound delivery business Badi but after implementing we are able see only one error message at one time. if both fields also missing system showing only one error.

So is there any code logic available so we able see both missing field error and warning message same time that we implemented in business logic  

Please share your input it will really be helpful for us. 

Thanks 

Samadhan

entry.title: Create a background in ABAP Cloud enivornment
entry.content:
Dear All ,

I want to schedule a process to run in background after the SAVE action . I am thinking to trigger a event after save action and then run my process in event handler class .

Apart for this is there any way I can schedule the process in job and submit job after save action ?

entry.title: migrate data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public), suggestion?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
Is there any possible way to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public)? Could you please suggest the possible methods?

entry.title: Req to create 2 sales order using bapi with the data from JSON payload by using SAP odata GW
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to create multiple sales orders using a BAPI in SAP using sap gateway call.I am getting data in deep entity format(JSON FILE).Kindly suggest me which method i can enhance so that i read the payload data in DPC ext class

entry.title: I want to select all entries coming in my RAP application.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a GSTR1 report by using RAP in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud, 

My application is working fine but when I am clicking on select all button to send the data to another portal then only initial entries( ex- 120 entries got selected ) are got selected only, but in my application i have 600+ entries.

I want to select all the coming entries in my GSTR1 application.

Please suggest how to acheive the same.

Thanks for your support.

 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility

entry.title: I want to Export/download all the data of my GSTR1 RAP application in Excel sheet.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a GSTR1 report by using RAP in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud, 

My application is working fine but when I am exporting my data into Excel then I will get the exact count of lines.

But the data is not exported correctly in excel, because when I am trying to filter my excel with a particular invoice then the data is not available in excel for the same invoice 

but I have the same data in my GSTR1 application.

I am using RAP's standard export functionality( which is coming by default in RAP ) for the same.

Thanks for your support.

entry.title: standard LIKP table not getting activated after append structure and doing se14
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am badly in need of help as client is waiting to move the tr into production. Plz help me with this issue.

 


I have added new field to the exising append structure zzlikp_append as per the business requirement to the standard table likp.
I have done se14 adjust and activate. 

The thing is that it is not throwing any error it is just processing. I would like to know how much time it will take to process 25000 records in my sandbox. it is more than 2 hours. 

I also faced one dump of 

TYPELOAD_NEW_VERSION”

which is not getting now. Neither it is showing any error. 

The only page in front of me is 

Is there any way to know how much time it will complete ?
or should I have to do anything to fix this issue ?

entry.title: What is the Better way for developing Reports in SAP S/4 Hana private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition implementation, it would be grateful  if you could suggest what is the better way for developing Reports in Private Edition?

Whether we need to develop in ALV Reports in SE38 or any other feasible way for developing in Private edition?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to merge DMS object (eg. PDF/JPEG) to an Adobe form output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to merge DMS object (eg. PNG/JPEG) to an Adobe form output?

I am able to merge .PDF type documents from DMS to the adobe form output using class cl_rspo_pdf_merge but how to merge .PNG type documents?

Kindly help.

 

Thank you,

Priyanka.

entry.title: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item based on condition in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to hide custom fields in Billing Document Item based on Condition? Same requirement i had in Sale order screen and achieved it through BADI. But i don't see similar BADI released for billing document to set properties of custom fields to Invisible / mandatory / read-only?

It would be grateful if you could help me in hiding custom fields in billing document item level.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Custom fields flow from Sale order to Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created few custom fields in Sale order item level, and i wanted those to flow to Purchase requisition and Purchase order in SAP S4HANA Public Edition.

I checked in Business Scenarios Tab while creating custom fields but unable to find PR and PO to enable.

It would be grateful if you could help me.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to develop customized reports in in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to develop Customized Reports in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps to develop customized reports.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to generate spool in SAP ABAP on Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,
I am calling my custom fragment-based adobe form using the class cl_somu_form_services method get_document which returns the XSTRING. I need to generate spool but could not find a way to achieve it.

With interface-based Adobe forms, it was very simple. Is there a way to generate spool in cloud development?

Thanks,
Sachin

entry.title: Error in Object Dependency Procedure
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a procedure using CU01 and am attempting to clear a characteristic value of the 'Date Format' data type.The following is the OD code, which is currently producing a syntax error. The error disappears if I remove t line# 2. Could you please help me resolve this issue?

 

 

 $SELF.DELTA_FLAG ?= 'N' IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' ',
 $SELF.CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ?= ' 'IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' ',
 $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP = 'X' IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' '.

 

 

Regards,

Mukhtar

SAP Variant Configuration and PricingPLM Variant Configuration

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: Cloud alternative of DESCRIBE FIELD dobj [TYPE typ [COMPONENTS com]] ??
entry.content:
I get error stating DESCRIBE is not allowed in current language version. 
My code is below:

    DESCRIBE FIELD <ls_dyn> TYPE DATA(lv_type) COMPONENTS DATA(lv_comp).

I know we have alternative for DESCRIBE TABLE.
But what should be done for DESCRIBE FIELD? 
DESCRIBE FIELD abapdocu 

Thanks!
